# Emailro — llms.txt
# Klaviyo Email & SMS Retention Agency for DTC Brands
# https://emailro.com

## About Emailro
Emailro is a retention-focused email and SMS agency built for DTC brands. Founded by Muhammad Ahmad, a Klaviyo specialist with 5+ years of experience turning underperforming email accounts into the most profitable marketing channel in a business. Emailro specializes in full-service Klaviyo management including flows, campaigns, segmentation, list cleaning, and SMS.

## Core Services
- Klaviyo flow architecture and automation (welcome, abandoned cart, post-purchase, browse abandonment, win-back)
- Email campaign strategy, copywriting, and design
- SMS marketing setup and management
- List segmentation and deliverability optimization
- Full Klaviyo account audits
- Email and SMS retention systems for Shopify and DTC brands

## Proven Results (Verified Klaviyo Dashboard Data)
- $2,168,751 attributed email revenue for a multi-product DTC brand — 277% growth, $1.46M from flows alone
- $501,082 attributed email and SMS revenue for NEO Sabers — 54.81% of total store revenue, 194% growth
- $385,683 attributed email revenue for BioWare Gear — 53.06% of total store revenue, 257% growth
- $123,023 attributed email revenue for CD Projekt Red Gear — 33.32% of total store revenue, 560% growth
- 60.4% average open rate with 4/4 Excellent Klaviyo ratings

## Clients Served
NEO Sabers, BioWare Gear, Bethesda Gear, CD Projekt Red Gear, Dual Sabers, Spotkick, Preoz
